ground_truth.title: Livery Insurance | Progressive Commercial
ground_truth.main_content: For-hire livery insurance, also known as livery insurance, is a type of commercial auto coverage for vehicles that are used by businesses that generate revenue from transporting people. Businesses that incidentally transport people, such as hotels that offer a shuttle service, typically don't need for-hire livery insurance. We offer affordable insurance for different types of livery businesses, from black car services to rideshare drivers. Our customizable coverages mean we can work with you to get the right livery insurance for your business. Start a quote and get a personalized livery insurance policy today. Types of livery insurance include: Taxi insurance for vehicles that provide transportation to the general public near large cities and airports, including sightseeing tour companies and airport shuttle services; Black car and limousine insurance for pre-arranged luxury transportation with scheduled appointments; Non-emergency medical transportation insurance for vehicles that transport individuals to medical appointments (available in select states); and Rideshare insurance for drivers using personal vehicles for services like Uber and Lyft. Various factors influence the cost of for-hire livery insurance, including state, vehicle use, driving history and coverage needs. We offer for-hire livery insurance Direct in 40 states. If you need livery coverage in Alaska, Florida, Illinois, Nevada, and New Jersey, you might be eligible for a quote through a Progressive specialty agent.
